title: Stop Losing on FOMC Wednesdays — 3 ICT Tips That Changed Everything (2026)
description: It's Wednesday. FOMC day. The market is a trap — and most traders walk right into it. Here are 3 ICT smart money concepts that R2F Trading uses to stay on the right side of the move. Fair value gaps, order blocks, and liquidity sweeps explained in under 30 seconds. Follow for daily setups at r2ftrading.com.
script: I blew 3 funded accounts on FOMC Wednesdays. Same mistake every time. Here's what the market was actually doing. Smart money sweeps liquidity BEFORE the real move. That spike? It's bait. After the sweep, find the fair value gap. Price WILL come back to fill it — 80% of the time. Then lock onto the order block beneath the FVG. That's your entry. Not the spike. Never the spike. Follow R2F Trading. New ICT setups every single day at r2ftrading.com.
